zh.Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England: 英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Lisle於1260年出生在英國波克夏金斯頓 李爾時，她的父親Robert de Lisle11257歲，母親Alice FitzGerold46歲。她於大約1286年與Warren Mauduit在英國維爾爾瓦明斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1300年享年41歲。

zh-hans.Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England: 英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Lisle于1260年出生在英国波克夏金斯頓 李爾时，她的父亲Robert de Lisle11257岁，母亲Alice FitzGerold46岁。她于大约1286年与Warren Mauduit在英国維爾爾瓦明斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1300年享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lisle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northumberland, Durham, and Yorkshire): variant of   Lyle   and a cognate of 2 below.
French: habitational name from L'Isle or Lisle, names of several places in various parts of France, named with Old French isle ‘island’ (from Latin insula). Compare Delisle .

variants.name: Lyle
meanings: Scottish and English (of Norman origin): topographic or habitational name from Anglo-Norman French del isle ‘from the island’ (from Latin de insula), denoting someone who lived on an island or who came from a place in France named Ile, Isle, or L'Isle. The surname may also in some cases be from Lille (Nord). Compare Lisle and Iles .

variants.name: Lile
meanings: English and French: variant of   Lisle  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Lisle was born in 1260, in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, her father, Robert de Lisle, was 11257 and her mother, Alice FitzGerold, was 46. She married Warren Mauduit about 1286, in Warminster, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1300, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Lisle est née en 1260, à Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Lisle, avait 11257 ans et sa mère, Alice FitzGerold, avait 46 ans. Elle a épousé Warren Mauduit environ 1286, à Warminster, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1300, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Lisle 1260 in Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Lisle 11257 und ihre Mutter Alice FitzGerold 46. Sie hat um 1286 in Warminster, Wiltshire, England Warren Mauduit geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1300 im Alter von 41 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Lisle è nata il nel 1260 nel Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Lisle, aveva 11257 anni e sua madre, Alice FitzGerold, aveva 46 anni. Lei sposato Warren Mauduit circa 1286, nel Warminster, Wiltshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1300, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.Nedging, Suffolk, England: イギリススフォルクネドジング
ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Lisleが1260年にイギリスバークシュアイアキングストン リスルで生まれた時，父Robert de Lisleは11257歳，母Alice FitzGeroldは46歳であった。約1286年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアワーミンスターでWarren Mauduitと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1300年に41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Lisle(이)가 1260년 영국 버크실르 킨그스턴 리슬일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Lisle(은)는 11257세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice FitzGerold(은)는 46세였다. 그녀는 대략 1286년 영국 윌츠히르 워민스터에서 Warren Mauduit(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1300년 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Lisle nasceu em 1260, em Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Lisle, tinha 11257 anos e sua mãe, Alice FitzGerold, tinha 46 anos. Ela casou-se com Warren Mauduit aproximadamente 1286, em Warminster, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1300, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Lisle родилась в 1260 г. в местности кингстон лисл, биркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Lisle было 11257 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice FitzGerold, 46. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Warren Mauduit около 1286 г. в местности варминстир, уилцхир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1300 г. в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Lisle nació en 1260, en Kingston Lisle, Berkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Lisle, tenía 11257 años y su mamá, Alice FitzGerold, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Warren Mauduit aproximadamente 1286, en Warminster, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió aproximadamente 1300, a la edad de 41 años.
